display.purpose: Revenue-scale numbers and major operating decisions.

body.purpose: Explanations, annotations, and dense analytical text.

shadows.name: briefing-hero
shadows.purpose: Only for the dominant first-viewport analytical panel.

motion.name: route-reveal
motion.purpose: One orchestrated reveal for the primary revenue trace.

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: A precise KPI surface with one headline value and one state.

components.name: Risk Chip
components.description: Compact underperformance signal used only with explicit risk text.

components.name: Status Rail
components.description: High-contrast operating-state summary beside the primary chart.

narrative.overview: A premium operating review with the clarity of transit information: decisive routes, explicit states, legible numbers, and enough civic confidence to be memorable.
keyCharacteristics: One dominant analytical story per viewport.
Route blue for primary analytical movement.
Signal colors always carry operational meaning.
Transport-signage labels paired with large tabular figures.

rules.name: Signal Integrity
rules.body: Signal colors always communicate a state and are never decorative.

rules.name: Numeric Priority
rules.body: Important numbers are larger than their labels.

rules.name: Briefing Sequence
rules.body: Order content as pulse, movement, drivers, cohort durability, then action queue.

dos: Do give the revenue trajectory the strongest visual weight.
Do preserve source-backed numbers and the synthetic-data disclosure.
donts: Don't use generic dark SaaS card grids as the main composition.
Don't add neon glows, glassmorphism, gradients, or ornamental dashboard icons.
